backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the full backend for TrackFlow, including state management for users, habits, activities, payment requests, and coupons, with access control, plan-limit enforcement, and mixin-based authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three dashboard-related features (progress bars, stats cards, activity timeline, React Query hooks, and actor initialization) to their relevant frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key fixes applied to each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the TrackFlow React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with hash history, React Query, and route layouts (public, protected with/without sidebar) including authentication guards and loading spinners.
frontend/src/components/activities/EditA: Modal dialog component for editing an existing activity's fields (habit, name, times, earnings, productive flag, notes) that submits updates via the useUpdateActivity mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: Admin UI component for creating and deleting discount coupons, with a form for code, discount percentage, usage limit, and expiry date, plus a table listing existing coupons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsQu: Admin component that displays pending payment requests in a table and allows approving or rejecting each request via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlatformSt: Displays a grid of four stat cards (total users, activities, habits, payment requests) fetched from the platform stats query, with a skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersTable: Admin table listing all users with search/filter, principal copy, and an inline plan selector that lets admins change and save a user's subscription plan.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Activi: Renders a chronological list of today's logged activities with habit color indicators, productivity badges, and edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AddAct: Form component for logging a new activity, allowing the user to select a habit, set start/end times, productivity flag, earnings, and notes for a given date.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/HabitP: Renders a progress bar card for a single habit, calculating completion percentage from logged activity minutes against an hourly goal, and displaying streak info.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatsC: A simple card component that displays a labeled statistic with an icon, supporting multiple color themes via a color map.
frontend/src/components/habits/HabitForm: A modal dialog for creating or editing a habit, with fields for name, goal type, goal hours, and color, using React Query mutations to persist changes.
frontend/src/components/habits/UpgradePl: A modal that informs users they've hit their plan's habit limit and presents upgrade options (Starter and Premium plans) with a link to the pricing page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple footer component displaying copyright info and a referral link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper that composes a collapsible Sidebar with a content area and Footer, adjusting the main content margin based on sidebar state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: A collapsible sidebar with navigation links, a logout button, and conditional admin link for authenticated users, using tooltips in collapsed mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, habits, activities, plans, payments, coupons, and admin operations using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS design tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Page component for viewing, filtering, bulk-deleting, and editing logged activities with pagination and CSV export support.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Password-protected admin panel page that renders tabs for platform stats, payments queue, users table, and coupon management.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics page displaying time distribution, daily earnings, and productivity charts using Recharts, with paid-plan gating for advanced views.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page showing daily stats cards, habit progress bars, and an activity timeline with an add-activity form for a selected date.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Displays the user's habits list with add/edit/delete functionality, enforces plan-based habit limits, and shows an upgrade modal when the limit is reached.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the TrackFlow login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles UPI payment submission for plan upgrades, including coupon validation, price calculation, and transaction ID entry.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Shows the three-tier pricing plans (Free, Starter, Premium) and handles plan selection, profile setup for new users, and navigation to the payment flow.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the user's profile (phone number), shows activity stats, and provides data export and account deletion options.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a habit tracker app describing existing features, a known dashboard data-loading bug, and fix requests targeting React Query hooks and actor initialization.
